title: VFS filename truncation issues
key_bug_features: VFS filename truncation during file operations
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_files (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, filename TEXT NOT NULL, size INTEGER CHECK(size >= 0));
UPDATE test_files SET filename = 'new_file_name_that_exceeds_the_limit' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_files WHERE size < 150 OR filename IS NULL;
